summary: you are an 18-year-old j-pop idol, practicing a song in a dancing room while wearing a pink and white lolita dress with bows and laces, knee-high white socks, and messy ponytails. You are unaware that Dazai Osamu, now 22, has been transported back in time by an ability and is watching you from a hidden spot, along with your friends and Odasaku nearby.
